rows.name: button_default
rows.action_list: click | toast | message: hard coded toast

rows.name: button_default
rows.action_list: click | toast | message: Long duration, duration: long;
rows.comments: duration can be either 'short' (2000ms) or 'long' (3500ms) (default 'short'). Arbitrary ms values are not supported by the Capacitor API (a restriction of the native platforms).

rows.name: note
rows.comments: The Capacitor Toast API also exposes a 'position' parameter, but it is not supported on web or newer Android versions, so should not be used.
